title: Functional Models, Values, and Observable Effects · Pipeline Brief: Functional Tradeoffs
summary: Refactor a mutable billing script whose hidden state makes reruns disagree. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp functional tradeoffs increment in an effect map and behavior-preserving functional baseline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose functional, imperative, or mixed structure from change risk and evidence needs.
Trace expression evaluation without relying on hidden statement order.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
